Who We Are

About Threadborne

Threadborne is a sustainability-driven startup focused on converting textile waste into functional and aesthetic materials for interior applications.

India generates millions of tons of textile waste every year, most of which ends up in landfills or is burned, causing irreversible environmental damage. We address this problem by developing innovative material solutions made from recycled textile fibers.

Our mission is to create a circular economy in the textile industry by transforming waste into valuable resources -- products that are both beautiful and responsible.

"
Textile waste is not garbage -- it is an untapped resource waiting to be reimagined.
Registered -- THREADBORNE INNOVATIONS LLP
SSIP Grant Recipient -- Rs.1,00,000
NIMS 2025 Participant
Ahmedabad, Gujarat

Our Process

TW
Textile Waste

Our Products

What We Make

Our Products

01
BR
Textile Bricks
Compressed from recycled textile fibers, our bricks are designed for decorative walls, feature panels, and interior partitions. Lightweight and easy to install without specialist tools.
Decorative Walls Lightweight Eco-Certified
02
Textile Clocks
Handcrafted wall clocks made entirely from compressed textile waste. Each piece is a unique functional artwork -- layered colors and rich textures transform any interior space.
Functional Art Unique Textures Wall Decor
03
PN
Decorative Panels
Custom textile panels for interior cladding, wall art and architectural accents. Available in a range of textures, patterns and colors -- designed to be the statement piece of any room.
Wall Art Custom Texture Interior Cladding
CO
Custom orders available
Contact us for bespoke panel designs

Our Progress

Our Traction

LLP
Officially Registered
THREADBORNE INNOVATIONS LLP is a legally registered entity, establishing our foundation as a serious, scalable startup.
SSIP
Rs.1,00,000 SSIP Grant
Received government funding through SSIP -- validating our concept and enabling prototype development.
NIMS
NIMS 2025 Participant
Represented and showcased Threadborne at NIMS 2025, gaining national-level exposure and valuable feedback.
R&D
Prototypes Developed
Successfully built and tested initial product prototypes -- textile clocks, bricks and panels -- proving our manufacturing process.
TR
Early Customer Trials
Completed early customer trials with real users, gathering product feedback to guide our next iteration.
LIVE
Products Live & Selling
Textile clocks are available for purchase at Rs.349 with free delivery -- our first commercial product line.
Our Purpose

Vision & Mission

Vision
To become a leading sustainable material brand transforming waste into value.
We envision a future where textile waste is never discarded -- where every fiber finds a second life as something beautiful, functional and lasting. Threadborne will be the brand that makes that future possible at scale.
Mission
To innovate scalable solutions for textile waste and integrate sustainability into everyday design.
We are committed to building products that prove sustainability and aesthetics are not opposites. Through continuous innovation in materials, processes and partnerships, we make it easy for designers and consumers to choose responsibly.
Our Impact

Environmental Impact

LW
Reduces Landfill Waste
Every product diverts kilograms of textile fibers from landfills and incineration.
CE
Circular Economy
We close the loop -- turning end-of-life fabric into beautiful new-life materials.
CO2
Lower Carbon Footprint
Recycled materials need far less energy than virgin resource extraction.
SC
Sustainable Construction
Encouraging architects and designers to adopt eco-conscious materials.

Market Potential

Growing Opportunity
Rising demand for sustainable interior materials
India's interior design industry growing 20%+ annually
Increasing awareness of circular economy practices
Government push for green building standards

Interior designers & architects
Event planners & decorators
Sustainable construction projects
Eco-conscious homeowners
